description_long: This is a modern broom featuring a long, slender black handle attached to a compact, rectangular brown bristle head. The handle appears to be made of metal or coated plastic, with a smooth, matte finish and a consistent cylindrical shape. The bristle head is relatively narrow and flat, suggesting it is designed for precise sweeping in tight urban spaces such as sidewalks or garages. The bristles are densely packed and arranged in a straight, uniform row, with no visible variation in length or color. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or decorative elements on the handle or bristle head. The overall design is minimalist and utilitarian, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban cleaning tasks.
description: A sleek broom with a long black handle and a compact, rectangular brown bristle head, designed for precise sweeping in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the black handle and the wide, flat face of the brown bristle head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bristle head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the handle and the back of the rectangular bristle head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the bristle head and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: The handle is long, straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of black-coated metal or plastic with a smooth, matte finish and no visible grip enhancements or end caps.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are densely packed in a straight, uniform row across a narrow, rectangular head, with no visible variation in length, color, or material.
attribute_mounting_position: Designed to be stored vertically, likely hung from the handle or leaned against a wall; no dedicated mounting feature is visible.
